title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. exutum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. exutum, also known as lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. exutum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of certain gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, Hieracium vulgatum subsp. exutum is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
